This app requires access to the local network for debugging purposes.
This app needs camera access to take photos and videos for testing camera components.
This app needs microphone access to record audio for testing audio components.
This app needs location access to test location-based components and features.
This app needs location access to test location-based components and features.
This app needs location access to test location-based components and features.
This app needs photo library access to save and share images from camera components.
This app needs photo library access to save images from camera components.
This app needs contacts access to test contact-related components and features.
This app needs calendar access to test calendar-related components and features.
This app needs reminders access to test reminder-related components and features.
This app needs notification access to test notification components and features.
This app needs tracking access to provide personalized experiences.
This app needs Face ID access for biometric authentication features.
This app needs motion access to test motion-based components and features.
